title: Google Ads API version deprecated
symptom: The Google Ads node fails with a 400 error, indicating an invalid argument. The error message specifies that version v17 is deprecated and requests to this version will be blocked.
applies_when: n8n is updated to the latest version
not_this_if: Using an older version of the Google Ads API
Error does not mention deprecated version
root_cause: The Google Ads API version v17 has been deprecated by Google, and requests made to this version are no longer supported. This leads to a 400 error indicating an invalid argument due to the unsupported version.
fix_steps: Update the Google Ads node to use API version v20 or newer.
If immediate access is needed, switch to using the Http Request node to manually configure the API call.
agent_instruction: Update the Google Ads node to use a supported API version or use the Http Request node as a workaround.
